textByHashes.cabca66fc19b69d9e2e3e48cd847e6189df49eea: 'Ello, and what are you after then?
textByHashes.d9f4bfd62dffeab897d00fddf765ae76b2ebda20: Oh, him? I'm surprised that coward is still around to be honest. He was never worthy of being a Mahjarrat.
textByHashes.926b8e1085e8f87675f7e8b711be431ef4a26f55: Hmm... This is concerning. What can I do to help?
textByHashes.3b9405c438c0e04d290e8faba3646562517060f9: I would be glad to. The chance to face a Mahjarrat again is something I have desired for many centuries. I look forward to the carnage.
textByHashes.13213ec8044c40d50354aa0b8d69f1635de77b3e: Control your enthusiasm, friend. I will join you in Falador as soon as I am able.
textByHashes.ee7a2273b53e7d02162146da68542565b1433e5f: 'Ello! Think you're ready to face Lucien then?
textByHashes.861140de467d5c1c32cff6b65aa03e4d58051732: Ah, it's somewhat of a tradition in our order. Perhaps there was once some reason, but it's long been lost to time.
textByHashes.6fc1ac44264134828cf1ed245a55fa26a9479bc0: Well who knows what would happen if we stopped? It would probably be fine, but can you really be sure?
textByHashes.bfdd9dac6626bfabbbf0ba3ff23b2a0a219285a5: We must find out where Lucien went! Turael and Duradel must be avenged!
textByHashes.0a3475744b9354535e287bd1dec21902748a1bdc: Such knowledge lost with their deaths... You are right. We have suffered enough for one day. We must retreat.
textByHashes.bfea238db31b77ee0fcd3f0d3293ad5dcfe8385a: He will be made to pay, my friend, and I assure you, when the day of his reckoning comes, I will be there.
textByHashes.28b31d254bf7a3e0760f821827ab1199114b444b: Then we will fight, side by side, my friend. We will fight in honour of Turael and Duradel, and we will see them avenged!
textByHashes.92d59ac4eef31440349fb8f920c4883b18239b84: You're actually very strong, are you sure you don't want Chaeldar in Zanaris to assign you a task?
textByHashes.7b172d997a7cfbf48b6c2eb5c2e7d4f760a1fcc5: Excellent, you're doing great. Your new task is to kill .
textByHashes.f3aa839fa0cd64749527916f22edb1e796c115ea: Good luck! Don't forget to come back when you need a new assignment.
textByHashes.b53aa2358d85a832f40919a7961648af35214402: You're still hunting , you have to go. Come back when you've finished your task.
textByHashes.e81f713b73d0c12d2f9cefbb81e6b44f1367b13d: You're still hunting , with to go.
textByHashes.2d898591aa17e44eb9f3da32c2911ab6fe5031e0: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.
textByHashes.4690813fc8fa29e4a7a15380409b6987d0454188: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.
textByHashes.3936915ec951a366ea891abbd6196e29203cad0a: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.
textByHashes.c0dcd9325e7ced3243a9d9d8c6771fbe5de4c8db: The Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.
textByHashes.1cd9bdb2d0b412718114a85d06ea7585b9c1aee5: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHashes.0e0b6ccc4a67de673135b9a90e4e5b040b7f149c: The Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHashes.47f277169b556d3646c41d8aa3ba877ceee4adb1: Okay, we'll keep checking your combat level.
textByHashes.dbd53e5f1c3835c46583db9ab8096068eaee8d1f: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will assign you anything from their lists, regardless of your combat level.
textByHashes.5bcec8e9ed26557d6f5513430380277f99178633: Bizarre, go on, what do you want then?
